THE MATH? IT’S MATHING

## Get value that lasts.  Get value that lasts.

When it comes to free phone offers, everyone has them. But, how do wireless companies really measure up? Over the past five years, T-Mobile families saved $3,700 versus Verizon and AT&T. That's a big number.

[Switch and save](https://www.t-mobile.com/cell-phone-plans?icid=MGPO_TMO_P_26PPSWSAV_A24E6236C5576C3545838)

**With 3+ lines. Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots.**Learn more

## Get value that lasts.

Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots from Q3 ’21 – Q4 ’25 among accounts with 3+ voice lines compared to AT&T and Verizon. Savings exclude discounts, credits, and optional charges. For more details, see [harrisx.com/T-Mobile](https://www.harrisx.com/t-mobile).

_Comparing postpaid consumer bills with T-Mobile vs. Verizon and AT&T plans among accounts with 3 or more voice lines. Excludes credits, discounts, and additional/optional charges (e.g., device, equipment, insurance, voicemail, international, overage, certain local charges). Bills sourced from HarrisX's Billing Snapshots product for each billing period between May 2021 – December 2025 with data collected from July 2021 – December 2025. Data is tabulated and reported monthly with a total sample of approximately 2,575 respondents per wave, reflecting the "most recent, completed bill" of the respondent at time of collection. While HarrisX intends to provide data that is nationally representative, some variance may occur due to sample limitation._

![A man lies on a futon as he smiles down at his blue phone. His toddler rests on his chest, resting his hand on his shoulder.](https://t-mobile.scene7.com/is/image/Tmusprod/BG-father-with-sleeping-baby-on-phone-1280x729:4x3?fmt=jpg&fmt=jpg&qlt=85,0&resMode=sharp2&op_usm=1.75,0.3,2,0)

## Get a Month On Us, plus up to $300 back.

**Fastest 5G Home Internet:** Based on Ookla Speedtest Intelligence® data, 2H 2025. May not be combined with some offers or discounts. **Money Back:** Limited-time; subject to change. Register code within 30 days of activating qualifying new Internet line ( **$100**: Rely; **$200**: Amplified; **$300**: All-In). This promotion is not associated, sponsored, or endorsed by Mastercard or Sunrise Banks N.A. Lines must be active and in good standing when card is issued. Max 1/account. May not be combined with some offers, discounts, or promotions.

Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots from Q3 ’21 – Q4 ’25 among accounts with 3+ voice lines compared to AT&T and Verizon. Savings exclude discounts, credits, and optional charges. For more details, see [harrisx.com/T-Mobile](https://www.harrisx.com/t-mobile).

_Comparing postpaid consumer bills with T-Mobile vs. Verizon and AT&T plans among accounts with 3 or more voice lines. Excludes credits, discounts, and additional/optional charges (e.g., device, equipment, insurance, voicemail, international, overage, certain local charges). Bills sourced from HarrisX's Billing Snapshots product for each billing period between May 2021 – December 2025 with data collected from July 2021 – December 2025. Data is tabulated and reported monthly with a total sample of approximately 2,575 respondents per wave, reflecting the "most recent, completed bill" of the respondent at time of collection. While HarrisX intends to provide data that is nationally representative, some variance may occur due to sample limitation._

## Frequently asked questions

- ## Why do you charge me the full monthly Equipment Installment Payment (EIP) every month?









The device you are financing has a monthly recurring payment. For this promotion, we give you a monthly bill credit to offset all, or a portion of, that monthly payment for the length of the EIP Agreement. Look for the credit in the “Equipment” section on your bill each month.

- ## What happens to my bill credits if I return my device?









If you return your device all EIP charges and credits will be reversed.

- ## What if I don’t want to sign up to finance my device?









EIP financing is required to get this promotional rate on the device.

- ## What happens if I return one of the devices in a Buy One, Get One (BOGO) offer, but keep the other?









A BOGO promotion requires two devices to be eligible and active. Promotional credits will stop if one of the two devices is returned.

- ## What if I pay off my EIP early?









If you pay off your EIP early, you’ll continue to receive the promised Recurring Device Credits (RDC) as an account-level credit through the remaining months of the promotional credit period (up to 24 or 36 months). Customers enrolling July 1, 2024 and later will forfeit the remainder of their monthly RDC if they choose to pay off their EIP early.

- ## Can I have multiple promotions on the same billing account (BAN)?









Yes, multiple promotions can be on the same account, but only one EIP promotional bill credit per device.

- ## Do I have to sign up for a rate plan?









Yes. See specific promotional eligibility rule for each promotion; service is required.

- ## What happens to my promotional device credits if I change my current account to a new account/ do a change of responsibility/ change my phone number/ I complete a warranty Exchange/ complete an exchange in remorse period?









This will not impact your eligibility for the promotion. The bill credits will continue during the promotional period if your account remains in good standing.

- ## If I cancel the rate plan later or my service, can I still keep the device with the discount?









Generally no, T-Mobile service is a requirement for the promotional pricing. When you cancel service, the monthly bill credits will stop and you will need to pay the full balance on your device.



**Contact us before canceling wireless service to determine if you are able to continue device payments, or credits stop & remaining balance at full price is due.**

- ## What if I become ineligible, can I become eligible again?









Yes, your bill credits will begin again and continue as long as you stay eligible for the promotion. You will not receive bill credits for the time you were not eligible.

- ## Do I have to pay Taxes?









Yes, taxes on the device are due at time of purchase.

- ## Where can I see information about the eligibility rules for my promotion?









Your promotion eligibility rules are listed on the [www.T-Mobile.com/PromotionalOffers](http://www.t-mobile.com/PromotionalOffers) page. To find your promo ID log on your My T-Mobile account. There is also a link in the SMS you received upon offer confirmation.

- ## What’s the difference between this and a 2 year service contract?









T-Mobile doesn’t have a service contract, you can cancel your service any time you choose, but it may impact your continued eligibility for the bill credit.



While you don’t have a service contract, you do have an EIP agreement which includes monthly payments on your device.

- ## What happens to the EIP if I cancel service?









  - This can vary based on the promotion tied to your device. Many promotional offers require active service to keep receiving monthly bill credits, and canceling service may affect those credits.
  - For the most accurate information, please review the terms and conditions of your specific promotion, which outline what happens to your device payment plan if service is canceled.

- ## Will my credit continue if my account is suspended?









Yes, your credit will continue for the length of the EIP agreement even if your account is suspended. However, your bill credits will stop if your account is canceled and you will need to pay the full balance on your device.

- ## Does canceling my service change Warranty/Insurance Policies?









Your device will be covered by the manufacturer warranty if you meet their requirements. Please contact the manufacturer directly for assistance. For insurance, you will no longer be eligible for insurance on your device through T-Mobile.

- ## What if I upgrade to a new phone in the next year?









The promotional bill credits apply to your current device and EIP agreement. Bill credits will stop if you JUMP! to a new device.

- ## What is the unlock policy for devices?









If your device is paid in full and has been used for 40 day or more on our network, you may request an unlock when you contact us to cancel. Once unlocked, you can use your device with the carrier of your choice.

- ## Am I eligible for new promotions if I still have an open EIP agreement on a single line?









Yes, as long as you have available credit on your account, you are able to have multiple EIP agreements on the same line (Example: phone EIP and accessory EIP). However, you are not able to have multiple EIP promotional bill credits on the same device.

- ## Can I stack my device offer with Family Freedom?









Yes, most device offers may be stacked with Family Freedom as long as the offer’s Terms & Conditions allow it and all Family Freedom eligibility requirements are met. Offers and eligibility can change over time.



For complete details, please review the offer disclaimer at [https://t-mobile.com/promotionaloffers](https://t-mobile.com/promotionaloffers).

web.title: T‑Mobile Turns up the Value with the Samsung Galaxy S26 Lineup
web.description: Samsung's newest Galaxy devices land at T‑Mobile — with on Us offers, benefits worth switching for and a five-year price guarantee.
web.markdown:
![](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/_admin/uploads/2026/02/11129850_nr-hero-Samsung_Miracle_Announce_2-24-26-500x250.jpg)[Arrow Right Icon](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/_admin/uploads/2026/02/11129850_nr-hero-Samsung_Miracle_Announce_2-24-26.jpg)

9 min read

- Facebook IconShare on Facebook
- Share on Twitter
- LinkedIn IconShare on LinkedIn

**BELLEVUE, Wash. — Feb. 25, 2026 —** The Samsung Galaxy S26 series is here at T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) and UScellular with on Us offers that make it easier to upgrade to Samsung’s latest flagship. At T-Mobile, Galaxy S26 takes advantage of 5G Advanced capabilities available only on T-Mobile’s 5G network, delivering a faster, more responsive experience with less lag — paired with [plans](https://www.t-mobile.com/cell-phone-plans?gclsrc=aw.ds&&cmpid=MGPO_PB_P_EVGRNPSTPD_429688027089_135032617145_708137445974&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=16905361613&gbraid=0AAAAAD79WuW5Rj7Sly-OkCn_VwA6sUc9h&gclid=EAIaIQobChMI7tSbjLLkkgMVSCitBh3LAA8JEAAYASAAEgJy0PD_BwE) that include built-in benefits customers actually want like streaming on Us, T-Satellite connectivity and a 5-year price guarantee.

And when customers switch and bundle voice with [T-Mobile’s 5G Home Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet?gclsrc=aw.ds&&cmpid=HEIS_PB_P_HINTRVLLOW_770466437178_164492998273_747956390868&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=21338382870&gbraid=0AAAAAD79WuWoBoa9Qh86HcG3e6D9IkZXw&gclid=EAIaIQobChMIjbjFucqskgMVQvDCBB35WAkQEAAYASAAEgKMHvD_BwE), they can save even more each month and score up to a $350 Samsung gift card for accessories and more. And soon, customers in most major cities will be able to get their internet delivered same day through DoorDash when signing up in the [T-Life](https://www.t-mobile.com/apps) app. Details [here](https://www.t-mobile.com/switch/15-minute-switch).

“This is our richest Galaxy offer ever — and the first time T-Mobile customers can get the Galaxy S26 Ultra on Us,” said John Saw, President & CTO, T-Mobile. “Our 5G Advanced network unlocks the full performance of the Galaxy S26, turning features like multi-carrier aggregation and uplink enhancements into noticeable real-world improvements in speed, responsiveness and reliability. Combined with built-in benefits and a 5-year price guarantee on our best plans, it’s unmatched performance and value you won’t find anywhere else.”

The Galaxy S26 lineup is available to preorder starting today, Wed., Feb. 25 at [T-Mobile](https://www.t-mobile.com/cell-phone/samsung-galaxy-s26) and [UScellular](https://www.uscellular.com/deals-my-account), with full availability online and in stores Wed., Mar. 11. New and existing customers, including businesses, can take advantage of the following offers:

**T-Mobile**

- **Galaxy S26 Ultra on Us** (or up to $1,300 off any in the series) when adding a line (no trade-in needed), or when trading in an eligible device in any condition on Experience Beyond or Go5G Next.
- **Galaxy S26+ on Us** (or up to $1,100 off any in the series) when trading in an eligible device in working condition on Experience More or Go5G Plus.
- **Galaxy S26 on Us** (or up to $900 off any in the series) when adding a line on Experience More or Go5G Plus.
- **$40 off new Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro** (or other select Samsung Buds) when preordering any Galaxy S26 device online or in the T-Life app.
- **Galaxy Tab A11+ on Us** when adding a tablet line.
- **$400 off any Galaxy Smartwatch** when adding a watch line.
- **Save 25% on Accessories** when bundling any three essentials (charging products, cases or screen protectors) — UScellular customers can snag this deal too!

Bundle 5G Home Internet & save even more:

- **Save $20/month on** [**5G Home Internet**](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet) when bundling with a T-Mobile voice plan — that’s $5/month more than T-Mobile’s standard bundle discount — with the monthly price for internet locked in for five years.
- **Get up to** **$350** to spend at Samsung when new Home Internet customers upgrade to a Galaxy S26 device.

**T-Mobile for Business**

- **Galaxy S26 Ultra on Us**(or up to $1,100 off any in the series with a $300 port in credit) for new customers switching to T-Mobile and adding a line on [SuperMobile](https://www.t-mobile.com/business/plans/supermobile), the best business plan on the best network.
- **Galaxy S26+ on Us** (or up to $1,100 off any in the series) when adding a line on an eligible business plan.
- **50% off Knox Suite Essentials and Enterprise 2Yr plans**— Samsung’s built-in security and device management platform — when purchasing any Samsung Galaxy device.

_Phone offers above are available via 24 and device offers at 36 monthly bill credits plus tax._

**UScellular**

- **Galaxy S26+ on Us** (up to $1,100 off) when adding a new line or upgrading on Everyday or Even Better Unlimited data plans, trade in required.
- **Galaxy S26 on Us** (up to $900 off) when adding a new line on any Unlimited data plan (trade-in required), or on Everyday or Even Better Unlimited data plans, no trade-in needed.

_The UScellular offers above are available via 36 monthly bill credits plus tax._

**Maximized Experience on the Best Network**

T-Mobile brings out the best on the Galaxy S26 Series. Recognized by [J.D. Power and reinforced by Opensignal and Ookla testing](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/network/customers-rate-t-mobile-as-the-network-quality-leader-in-the-most-u-s-regions), T-Mobile’s 5G network leadership translates into real world wins like quicker uploads and downloads for large files and smooth 4K streaming — even in crowded places like airports and events — all supported by 6-downlink carrier aggregation, Uplink carrier aggregation and Uplink Tx switching on T-Mobile’s Nationwide 5G Advanced network.

Being with T-Mobile means getting more — exclusive perks and a next-level experience only the Un-carrier delivers. Customers can enjoy the [Best Entertainment Bundle in Wireless](https://www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming?INTNAV=tNav%3AJoinUs%3ATvStreamingDeals) — Netflix and Hulu on Us, Apple TV for just $3/month — [industry-leading travel benefits](https://www.t-mobile.com/benefits/travel?INTNAV=tNav%3AJoinUs%3ATravel) like international high-speed data in 215+ countries and destinations, T-Satellite connectivity, and exclusive hotel and rental-car perks. Plus, extras they can get just for being customers like free DashPass by DoorDash, weekly freebies and deals through [T-Mobile Tuesdays](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers/t-mobile-tuesdays), reserve and priority tickets for premium concerts, festivals and events nationwide and [more](https://www.t-mobile.com/benefits).

**Joining is Simple, Staying Makes Sense**

Anyone can switch in minutes with [15 Minutes to Better](https://www.t-mobile.com/resources/how-to-join-us?INTNAV=tNav%3AJoinUs%3AHowToSwitch) and get devices delivered the same day through DoorDash Drive. Or start with [T-Mobile Trial](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers/free-trial) to experience the Un-carrier’s network and select perks completely free — all in the [T-Life](https://www.t-mobile.com/apps) app. With [Family Freedom](https://www.t-mobile.com/switch/pay-off-carrier-etf-phone-deal), customers who switch can get up to $800 per line (up to four lines) to help cover eligible device balances, plus [plans](https://www.t-mobile.com/cell-phone-plans?INTNAV=tNav%3APlans%3AMagenta) packed with benefits and savings that make switching simple and staying makes sense.

**Galaxy S26 Series: More Deets and How to Get It**

Built to simplify everyday moments, the [Galaxy S26 series](https://www.t-mobile.com/dialed-in/devices/samsung-galaxy-s26-vs-galaxy-s25) delivers Samsung’s best camera experience yet powered by Galaxy AI features like Photo Assist and Creative Studio for effortless capture and editing, and when paired with Galaxy Buds4Pro, unlocks bold, immersive sound with crisp high-res audio. Customers can pick up the latest Galaxy S26 smartphones on T-Mobile’s Equipment Installment Plan:

- Galaxy S26 comes in Black, White, Sky Blue and Cobalt Violet in 256GB and 512GB starting at $37.50/month ($0 down; $899.99).
- Galaxy S26+ comes in Black, White, Sky Blue and Cobalt Violet in 256GB and 512GB starting at $45.84/month ($0 down; $1,099.99).
- Galaxy S26 Ultra comes in Black, White, Sky Blue and Cobalt Violet in 256GB, 512GB and 1TB starting at $54.17/month ($0 down; $1,299.99).

For full specs and offers, visit [www.t-mobile.com/offers/samsung-phone-deals](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers/samsung-phone-deals) or [www.samsung.com](http://www.samsung.com/). For business offers visit [www.t-mobile.com/business/offers/samsung-galaxy-5g](https://www.t-mobile.com/business/offers/samsung-galaxy-5g). For UScellular offers, visit: [www.uscellular.com/samsung](https://www.uscellular.com/samsung).

Follow the T-Mobile Newsroom on [X](https://x.com/tmobilenews) and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/tmobilenews/) to catch the latest company updates.

\# # #

Qualifying credit, service (e.g. $100+/mo. + AutoPay, plus taxes & fees) & trade-in (e.g., Save $1,300: Samsung Galaxy S25), req’d. Trade-in terms/conditions apply. If you have cancelled lines in the past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first.  May not be combinable with some offers. See details at T-Mobile.com. **Device Offers**:  If you cancel entire account before receiving bill credits, credits stop & balance on req’d finance agreements for all devices is due (e.g., $399.99 – Samsung Galaxy Watch8 40mm). Credits end if you pay off early.Tax on pre-credit price due at sale. Allow 3-4 bill cycles after requirements are met. **$20/mo HSI:** Via bill credit.  Qualifying credit, postpaid voice line, & new Internet line req’d. If you cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Credits may take up to 2 bill cycles; credits stop if you cancel lines or change plans. Not combinable with some offers. **Knox Suite:** 24-mo. term req’d. Add’l promo seats available during offer; renew at MSRP after. **5 YR Guarantee: Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.** Guarantees monthly price of  on-network talks, text, & 5G data for accounts activating on an Experience plan, and for fixed-wireless 5G internet data for accounts on eligible internet plans. See exclusions & details at T-Mobile.com. **Galaxy S26 Experience:** Based on internal GS25 testing on T-Mobile’s network; GS26 performance projected due to similar/enhanced 5G Advanced features. Results may vary. **For J.D. Benefits vary by plan & may require activation; see plan for details. **15 Minutes:** Check out in 15 minutes per line. **Family Freedom:** Via virtual prepaid card. New device, qual’g credit, service, trade-in an eligible device & port-in req’d. Card typically takes 15 days after rebate submission.

**About T-Mobile US, Inc**

As the supercharged Un-carrier, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) is powered by an award-winning 5G network that connects more people, in more places, than ever before. With T-Mobile’s unique value proposition of best network, best value and best experiences, the Un-carrier is redefining connectivity and fueling competition while continuing to drive the next wave of innovation in wireless and beyond. Headquartered in Bellevue, Wash., T-Mobile provides services through its subsidiaries and operates its flagship brands, T-Mobile, Metro by T-Mobile and Mint Mobile. For more information, visit https://www.t-mobile.com.
